page_metadata.biotools__summary: R package, that implements a statistical method for: i) genotyping from next-generation sequencing reads, and ii) conducting inference on allelic imbalance at heterozygous sites.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: R package, that implements a statistical method for: i) genotyping from next-generation sequencing reads, and ii) conducting inference on allelic imbalance at heterozygous sites.
